title: Post-M8 UI interaction and i18n audit
summary: Produce the current-code blocker matrix for default UI, mouse interaction, camera, commands, localization, responsive behavior, visual identity and minimum playable chain.
acceptance: Audits whether the default launch still reads as diagnostics/product-gate harness versus player HUD
Audits selectable residents/objects, UI button clickability, pointer-event layering, camera drag/zoom/keyboard behavior and failure feedback
Audits zh-CN/en locale defaults, manual language switching, hardcoded player-visible strings, missing-key coverage and diagnostics isolation
Audits windowed/fullscreen responsive behavior for the required viewport set and records screenshot or DOM evidence needs
Records whether a minimum playable interaction chain is currently real, absent or blocked by protocol/adapter gaps

history.details: Audited post-M8 UI interaction/i18n state; default launch is player-facing but fixture-backed, zh-CN HUD still leaks English read-model prose, drag/reset camera controls are absent, small-viewport evidence is reachability-only, and minimum playable gameplay interaction remains blocked by protocol/UI adapter gaps. Required checks pass; WM-0118 artifact refreshes from verification were restored because they are outside WM-0130 allowedPaths.

verified: No blocking findings; WM-0130 is audit-only, product code unchanged, required checks pass, and the blocker matrix honestly identifies default HUD, interaction, i18n, responsive evidence, and playable-chain gaps without claiming implementation completion.
Integrated verified post-M8 UI interaction and i18n audit after handoff, taskctl, diff and corepack pnpm quality gates passed.

forbiddenPaths: public release or platform verdict changes
telemetry, accounts, paid services or public save compatibility

review.summary: No blocking findings; WM-0130 is audit-only, product code unchanged, required checks pass, and the blocker matrix honestly identifies default HUD, interaction, i18n, responsive evidence, and playable-chain gaps without claiming implementation completion.

integration.summary: Integrated verified post-M8 UI interaction and i18n audit after handoff, taskctl, diff and corepack pnpm quality gates passed.
